subcategories.label: Weight — 10 rounds
subcategories.description: Ten questions; same deck as Weight.

subcategories.label: Height / length
subcategories.description: Which animal is taller or longer (typical adult)?

subcategories.label: Height / length (shorter)
subcategories.description: Which animal is shorter or smaller (typical adult)?

subcategories.label: Country land area
subcategories.description: Which country has a larger land area?

subcategories.label: Country land area (smaller)
subcategories.description: Which country has a smaller land area?

subcategories.label: Major rivers (length)
subcategories.description: Which river’s main-stem length is longer (published estimates)?
subcategories.sourceNote: Rounded mainstream lengths; sources disagree on exact rankings.

subcategories.label: Tall buildings & towers
subcategories.description: Which structure’s architectural or structural height is greater?
subcategories.sourceNote: Approximate published heights; masts vs skyscrapers mixed intentionally.

categories.label: Science & space
categories.description: Solar system sizes and similar round-number science facts.

subcategories.label: Planet & moon diameters
subcategories.description: Which body has a larger equatorial diameter?
subcategories.sourceNote: Approximate mean diameters for planets and large moons; small bodies rounded.

categories.label: Cinema
categories.description: Feature-film runtimes (theatrical or common streaming cut).

subcategories.label: Movie runtimes
subcategories.description: Which film’s listed runtime is longer?
subcategories.sourceNote: Rounded minutes; cuts vary by region and re-release.

categories.label: Sports
categories.description: Pro football and basketball career numbers (approximate).

subcategories.description: Who averaged more points per game for their career?

subcategories.label: NBA — career PPG (lower)
subcategories.description: Who averaged fewer points per game for their career?

subcategories.label: NBA — career PPG (hard pairs)
subcategories.description: Same stat, but pairs are biased toward closer numbers.

subcategories.label: NFL — career passing yards
subcategories.description: Who threw for more career passing yards (regular season)?

subcategories.description: Who threw for fewer career passing yards?

categories.label: Mixed
categories.description: A random stat each round from every deck.

subcategories.label: All stats mix
subcategories.description: Each round picks a random stat from any deck in the game.
subcategories.sourceNote: Deck and units change each round; see on-card labels.
